title: Trump's social media post on crypto bill 'not enough' to move legislation, TD Cowen says
message_html: Trump's social media post on crypto bill 'not enough' to move legislation, TD Cowen says ...
snippet: Trump's direct involvement is required, but it is hard to see that occurring while the U.S. is in armed conflict with Iran, TD said.

title: Morgan Stanley Picks Coinbase, BNY Mellon as Custodians for Planned Bitcoin ETF
message_html: Morgan Stanley Picks Coinbase, BNY Mellon as Custodians for Planned Bitcoin ETF ...
snippet: Morgan Stanley reveals its Bitcoin ETF custodians as the Wall Street giant moves closer to a full crypto embrace.
